channel.title: GitHub HLSL Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of HLSL in GitHub

item.title: ColinLeung-NiloCat/UnityURPToonLitShaderExample
item.description: A very simple toon lit shader example, for you to learn writing custom lit shader in Unity URP

item.title: Eldeston/ESTN-Shaders
item.description: A shader pack created for Minecraft Bedrock, developed by Eldeston, published by FlameRender Studios.

item.title: notpeelz/reshade-xhair
item.description: A heavily customizable, fullscreen-compatible crosshair overlay for ReShade

item.title: ray-cast/ray-mmd
item.description: 🎨 The project is designed to create a physically-based rendering at mikumikudance.

item.title: Otakumouse/stormshade
item.description: Custom reshade build (unlocked z-depth) + shader preset for Final Fantasy 14.

item.title: crosire/reshade-shaders
item.description: A collection of post-processing shaders written for ReShade.
